name: doubao_geo_audit
description: Evaluate how easily a brand or product description can be understood, quoted, and recommended by Doubao. Return a concise Chinese GEO audit report.

content.description: The source text to audit, such as a brand intro, website copy, article, FAQ, or sales script.

content_type.description: Optional short label for the source text.

report_mode.description: Use compact by default to reduce latency in automated evaluation.
